subcodes.first_line: All glory be unto Him! Some have held that the realization of all things, the composition of created beings and their dissolution, springeth from interaction [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بعضی بر آنند تحقق اشیاء و ترکیب کائنات و تحلیل آن منبعث از تفاعل است
subcodes.subjects: @interconnectedness; all things involved in all things; chain of being, @proofs for the existence of God
